title: Automatic recognition of internal email addresses
excerpt: I would like the email function to auto fill the email addresses for people in my team - typing them out is a waste of my time and means I preference outlook as an option instead for emailing.

posts.author: NicoleH (Nicole Hunter)
posts.cookedHtml: I would like the email function to auto fill the email addresses for people in my team - typing them out is a waste of my time and means I preference outlook as an option instead for emailing.
